c74object.name: dk.triggerframe~
c74object.digest: Buffer recording for frame analysis on trigger input
c74object.description: The dk.triggerframe~ records audio into a rolling buffer~ to be analyzed by descriptor objects down the line. Takes a trigger, gate, or bang as its input to output the frame to analyze. This is mainly useful when you want to trigger descriptor analysis based on another process so onset detection is no longer necessary.
c74object.discussion: If receiving a bang, the frame for analysis will be sent out as quickly as possible, but it may not be sample accurate as a trigger would be. So when trying to syncronize multiple sample-accurate processes, you should always use triggers.

outlet.digest: Sample position to beging analysis from
outlet.description: Sample position to analyze in rolling buffer~ along with buffer~ name.

attribute.name: delay
attribute.digest: Amount of time to wait before sending frame to analyze
attribute.description: Amount of time to wait, in samples, before sending frame to analyze.

attribute.name: maxbuffertime
attribute.digest: Amount of time in circular buffer~
attribute.description: Amount of time (in ms) in circular buffer~.
